In the 'Inventory' sheet, new columns named 'Current_On_Hand', 'Sell_Through_Pct', and 'WOS' are visible and populated with numerical values.
In the 'Inventory' sheet, new columns named 'Markdown_Pct', 'Proposed_Price', and 'Markdown_Cost' are visible and populated with numerical values.
A sheet tab named 'Summary' is visible at the bottom of the spreadsheet interface.

task_completion.description: List the required clothing categories in the Summary sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Summary' sheet displays the categories: Outerwear, Tops, Bottoms, Footwear, and Accessories.

task_completion.description: Calculate Total_Markdown_Cost and Avg_Sell_Through for each category
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Summary' sheet displays calculated numerical values for 'Total_Markdown_Cost' and 'Avg_Sell_Through' corresponding to each of the five categories.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the spreadsheet application or wrote a visible script to perform the calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the spreadsheet GUI, entering formulas, or executing a Python/pandas script, rather than the final results appearing without any visible work.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas or proper data manipulation rather than hardcoding fake answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in the spreadsheet application shows actual formulas (e.g., referencing other cells or sheets like 'Markdown_Rules') or a script contains the correct logic, rather than manually typed static numbers.

integrity.description: The file remains a proper .xlsx spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface confirms the file is still an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx) and has not been downgraded to a plain text CSV file masquerading as a spreadsheet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is located at /home/ga/Documents/retail_inventory.xlsx. The 'Inventory' sheet must contain exactly these new columns: Current_On_Hand, Sell_Through_Pct, WOS, Markdown_Pct, Proposed_Price, Markdown_Cost. The 'Summary' sheet must aggregate data for exactly five categories: Outerwear, Tops, Bottoms, Footwear, and Accessories.
